title: Bridging Design Systems and Code with MCP and AI Agents
summary: IBM Technology explains how design systems and context engineering guide AI agents in modern software design. MCP and AI agents work together to build consistent, correct applications by bridging design systems with code generation.
writeup: This IBM Technology video explains how design systems and context engineering guide AI agents during software design, and how the Model Context Protocol (MCP) connects those design systems to code generation. The pairing matters because it pushes AI agents toward consistent, correct applications rather than ad hoc output. The key takeaways: design systems supply the rules and components that constrain generation, context management feeds agents the right information, and MCP serves as the bridge between design definitions and the code agents produce.
